alternativeText.description: Alternative text on the title area.

enableGradientEffect.description: Indicates whether the title area has a gradient effect enabled.

imageWebUrl.description: URL of the image in the title area.

layout.description: Enumeration value that indicates the layout of the title area. The possible values are: imageAndTitle, plain, colorBlock, overlap, unknownFutureValue.

serverProcessedContent.description: Contains collections of data that can be processed by server side services like search index and link fixup.

showAuthor.description: Indicates whether the author should be shown in title area.

showPublishedDate.description: Indicates whether the published date should be shown in title area.

showTextBlockAboveTitle.description: Indicates whether the text block above title should be shown in title area.

textAlignment.description: Enumeration value that indicates the text alignment of the title area. The possible values are: left, center, unknownFutureValue.
